contract.name: v2/agency/treasury_account/tas/object_class.md
contract.description: Returns obligated and outlay totals by object class for a Treasury Account Symbol, with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

tas.description: Treasury Account Symbol identifier for the account to summarize; echoed in responses even when no data is found.
tas.constraints: Required; accepts account strings with digits and hyphens and optionally one embedded slash; endpoint expects trailing slash or returns 301.

fiscal_year.description: Appropriations fiscal year to evaluate; defaults to the API's current FY (observed: 2026) when omitted.
fiscal_year.constraints: Required when you need historical data; integer between 2017 and 2026 inclusive; higher values return 422 and pre-FY2017 returns succeed with no rows plus a warning message; non-integers produce 400.

filter.description: Case-insensitive token filter applied to object class names only; does not search program activity names.
filter.constraints: Optional; multi-word filters behave oddly—rows may return with parent totals reduced while child values remain unfiltered, and queries like 'contract' that don't match a full token return zero rows.

order.description: Sort direction for the selected field. Default is 'desc'.
order.constraints: Optional enum ['asc','desc']; default is 'desc'; invalid values return 400.

sort.description: Field used for ordering results. Default is 'obligated_amount'.
sort.constraints: Optional enum ['name','obligated_amount','gross_outlay_amount']; default is 'obligated_amount'; invalid values return 400.

page.constraints: Optional integer >= 1; defaults to 1; out-of-range pages return empty results with metadata for the requested page; zero triggers 422.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows per page.
limit.constraints: Optional integer between 1 and 100 inclusive; default 10; out-of-range values return 422; non-integer input returns 400.

treasury_account_symbol.description: Echo of the requested TAS, including any slash-suffixed components.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year actually queried (defaults to the API's current FY when omitted).

total.description: Total result rows available for the query.

limit.description: Page size applied to the query.

next.description: Next page number when more data exists, otherwise null.

previous.description: Previous page number when applicable, otherwise null.

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

obligated_amount.description: Total obligations for the object class; may be negative when deobligations occur.

gross_outlay_amount.description: Gross outlays for the object class; may be negative.

obligated_amount.description: Program activity obligations; values may be negative.

gross_outlay_amount.description: Program activity gross outlays; may be negative.

children.description: Program activity breakdown; will be an empty array when activities are not yet published.

results.description: Object class entries for the treasury account, including nested program activities.

messages.description: Informational strings. The array is always present; pre-FY2017 requests populate it with a warning about DATA Act coverage.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Requests without the trailing slash receive a 301 redirect to the slash-terminated URL.

Filter tokens must match the object class name exactly; multi-word strings and partial tokens either return no rows or shrink parent totals while leaving child amounts untouched, so consumer-side reconciliation is required.
Pages beyond the available data return empty result sets while echoing the requested page number in metadata rather than raising errors.
Fiscal years earlier than FY2017 return 200 with an explanatory message, while values above the current FY (2026) are rejected with 422.
404 responses for malformed paths and 301 redirects return HTML rather than JSON, so clients must handle non-JSON bodies.

probes.notes: pass - TAS with no data returns 200 and an empty result list using the default FY2026.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"treasury_account_symbol":"097-X-0100-000","fiscal_year":2024,"page_metadata":{"total":5},"results":["Grants and fixed charges","Contractual services and supplies"],"messages":[]}

probes.notes: pass - baseline successful request with five object classes and populated children.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"page_metadata":{"page":1,"limit":2,"next":2,"hasNext":true},"results":["Grants and fixed charges","Contractual services and supplies"]}

probes.notes: pass - limit=2 pagination exposes hasNext/next pointers.
pass - middle page reveals both previous and next metadata fields.
pass - requesting a page beyond available rows returns an empty array without error.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"page_metadata":{"limit":100,"total":5},"results":["Grants and fixed charges","Contractual services and supplies"]}

probes.notes: pass - limit=100 succeeds, suggesting it is the maximum accepted page size.
fail - documentation omits the enforced 1-100 limit range.
pass - validation rejects limit values below 1.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'limit'. 'ten' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: pass - non-numeric limit triggers a 400 type error.
pass - page enforces a minimum of 1.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. 'notanumber' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: pass - fiscal_year must be an integer; strings are rejected.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. '2024.5' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: pass - non-integer numeric fiscal_year is also rejected.
fail - hard upper bound of 2026 is not documented.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results":[],"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - earlier fiscal years return no data but emit an explanatory message.
pass - omitting fiscal_year defaults to FY2026 data with empty children arrays.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results":["Unknown","Personnel compensation and benefits","Grants and fixed charges"]}

probes.notes: pass - sort=name uses descending order when order is omitted.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results":["Acquisition of assets","Contractual services and supplies","Grants and fixed charges"]}

probes.notes: pass - combining sort=name with order=asc yields alphabetical ordering.
pass - invalid sort values raise 400 errors listing allowed options.
pass - invalid order parameter returns 400 with enum guidance.
pass - filter 'grant' returns the matching object class regardless of case.
fail - filter 'person' returns unexpected rows with totals that diverge from child sums, contradicting the simple name-matching description.
pass - unmatched filters return an empty set without error.
fail - filter 'contract' finds nothing even though an object class named 'Contractual services and supplies' exists.
pass - TAS strings with a slash component are accepted but may not map to data.
pass - extreme page numbers simply return empty results while echoing the requested page.
fail - missing trailing slash triggers a 301 redirect with an HTML response body.
fail - paths with more than one slash segment return HTML 404 pages.
pass - FY2022 demonstrates typical data including children with names like 'N/A' and negative amounts.
pass-2 - omitting fiscal_year defaults to FY2026 where every object class returns an empty children array despite populated totals.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"page_metadata":{"total":0},"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass-2 - confirms pre-FY2017 queries succeed with an empty result set and populate the messages array with the DATA Act warning.
fail - multi-word filter narrows parent totals but leaves child program activity values unfiltered, demonstrating inconsistent subtotaling.

mismatches: Docs do not mention the enforced 1-100 range on 'limit', yet the API rejects values outside that window with 422 errors.
Docs describe 'filter' as matching object class names, but live behavior includes multi-word inconsistencies and leaves child program activity totals untouched, causing totals to disagree.
Docs imply fully populated ProgramActivity children, but live FY2026 responses return object classes with empty child arrays.
gaps: Exact tokenization and ranking rules for 'filter' remain unknown; we cannot predict which partial strings will match.
The backend logic producing filtered child totals is opaque—we cannot determine whether the mismatch is a bug or intentional aggregation strategy.
Accepted TAS path variants beyond single optional slash (e.g., normalization of zero-padded segments) were not exhaustively enumerated.
risks: Clients expecting JSON everywhere must cope with HTML bodies for 301/404 responses.
Filter results may mislead consumers because parent totals change while child program activity totals stay unfiltered, making reconciliation difficult.
Requests default to the current fiscal year (2026), which contains preliminary values and empty children arrays; callers should explicitly set fiscal_year for stable data.

added: Recorded pass-2 probes covering default FY2026 behavior and multi-word filter anomalies.
changed: Set contract and schema confidence to observed and expanded the output schema with explicit field definitions.
Clarified filter semantics, fiscal_year bounds, and pagination metadata requirements in the contract.
